/services.title: Services & Pricing | Yash Makeovers
/services.description: Explore Yash Makeovers bridal packages: Bridal ($600), Pre-Bridal ($450), Full Glam ($350), Regular Party ($250). Serving all of the GTA.

mainEntity.name: How much does a bridal makeup artist cost in the GTA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Bridal packages at Yash Makeovers start at $600 per person per event — this includes HD waterproof makeup, hairstyling, premium mink lashes, dupatta and jewelry setting, a touchup kit, and a consultation call. Pre-bridal events (Mehndi, Sangeet, Engagement) are $450, Full Glam is $350, and Regular Party is $250. All prices are per person per event.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book my wedding makeup?

acceptedAnswer.text: We recommend booking 6–12 months in advance, especially for peak wedding season (May through October) when dates fill up fast. A 30% non-refundable deposit via e-transfer secures your date — no payment is required until we've spoken and you're ready to move forward.

mainEntity.name: Do you travel to my venue?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — Yashpreet travels to venues across the entire GTA. Travel fees are $75 within Peel Region and up to $150 for the wider GTA. Alternatively, you're welcome to visit the studio at 27 Divinity Circle, Brampton ON L7A 3Y3.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer a trial before the wedding day?

acceptedAnswer.text: All Bridal and Pre-Bridal packages include a consultation call 2-3 weeks prior to event date to discuss your look and review inspiration pictures. If you'd also like a full makeup trial, the fee is $250. Trials are scheduled within 2-3 business days of booking confirmation, subject to availability. If you decide not to proceed after the trial, the deposit for the main event dates is fully refundable, provided the trial is booked immediately following the booking. If the trial is scheduled at a later date, the deposit becomes non-refundable.

mainEntity.name: What makeup brands and products do you use?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yashpreet works exclusively with professional-grade luxury brands — DIOR, Charlotte Tilbury, Chanel, YSL Beauty, Gucci, Too Faced. These formulas are chosen specifically for all-day wear through the long hours of wedding.

mainEntity.name: Do you do hair styling as well as makeup?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, every package includes both makeup and hairstyling. The Bridal package includes full hairstyling with hair padding, pins, and dupatta and jewelry setting. For best results, please for the hairstyling process, please wash your hair thoroughly using shampoo only — refrain from applying conditioner or other hair products. We recommend drying your hair straight the night before your appointment.

mainEntity.name: What events does the Bridal package cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Bridal package ($600) is designed for main ceremony events — Ceremony, Reception, Nikkah, Walima, Baraat. For pre-wedding events like Rokah, Jagoo, Engagement, Mehndi, Sangeet, the Pre-Bridal package ($450) is the right fit.

mainEntity.name: Is there an extra charge for early morning appointments?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, a $100 early morning fee applies for start times between 4:30–6:00 AM, as these require significantly earlier preparation and travel.

mainEntity.name: Can I add services like airbrush or hair extensions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, several add-ons are available: airbrush application ($40), client's own hair extension application ($35), studio-provided hair extensions ($75 per extension), blow-dry on wet hair ($20), bridal dupatta setting ($50), party dupatta setting ($30), jewelry setting ($20), premium mink lashes ($20), and touchup kit ($25).

mainEntity.name: What is your cancellation and deposit policy?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 30% deposit is required to confirm your booking and is non-refundable and non-transferable. Partial cancellation of a booked package is not permitted — all included services must be completed. The one exception is the trial-linked refund: if a trial is booked immediately after confirmation and you choose not to proceed, the deposit is fully refundable.

mainEntity.name: How should I prepare for my appointment?

acceptedAnswer.text: For makeup: for optimal results, please arrive with a freshly washed face, free of makeup or mascara. This ensures the best outcome for your appointment. For hair: for the hairstyling process, please wash your hair thoroughly using shampoo only — refrain from applying conditioner or other hair products. We recommend drying your hair straight the night before your appointment. This gives Yashpreet the best possible base to work with and ensures the longest-lasting results.

mainEntity.name: Do you work with all skin tones and cultural wedding traditions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. Yashpreet specializes in South Asian and multicultural bridal looks and has worked with 2,000+ brides across Indian, Pakistani and other traditions. She has deep experience with all skin tones, undertones, and cultural styling requirements from gurdwara ceremonies to grand ballroom receptions.

jsonLd.name: Yashpreet
jsonLd.description:
With 10+ years of experience and 2,000+ brides transformed across the GTA,
Yashpreet brings an unmatched blend of artistry and calm to every appointment.
Her journey began with a deep love for makeup and a belief that every woman deserves
to feel like the most radiant version of herself on her wedding day. Specialising in
South Asian and multicultural bridal looks, she has become the most trusted name for
brides in Brampton, Mississauga, Toronto, and beyond — known not just for flawless results,
but for making every bride feel comfortable, confident, and truly seen.
